basic_details.job_title: IIM Bangalore Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM Banaglore) has released the official Manager Notification 2026 on 11 May 2026 at the official website of Indian Institute of Management Bangalore. Has been announced under the IIM Bangalore Manager Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of Graduate degree from a reputed University or Institute with relevant accreditation, while MBA or equivalent qualification is preferred, can apply online till 24-05-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.details: A Graduate degree from a reputed University or Institute with relevant accreditation. A Postgraduate qualification in Management (MBA or equivalent) is preferred.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Bangalore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Bangalore Manager – Post Graduate Programme Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIMB Manager – Post Graduate Programme Recruitment 2026 is 24th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree from a reputed University or Institute with relevant accreditation. A Postgraduate qualification in Management (MBA or equivalent) is preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for the IIMB Manager – Post Graduate Programme posts?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIMB Manager – Post Graduate Programme Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Manager – Post Graduate Programme position at IIMB is contractual. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the institute.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the Indian Institute of Management Bangalore located?
faq.answer: The Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIMB) is located in Bangalore, Karnataka. The recruitment is open for candidates residing in or willing to relocate to Karnataka.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Karnataka apply for this position?
faq.answer: While the notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Karnataka, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official PDF to confirm if candidates from other states are also considered.

faq.question: Q8. What should candidates do if they face issues while applying online?
faq.answer: If candidates encounter any technical difficulties during the online application process, they should try to resolve them by refreshing the page or clearing browser cache. For persistent issues, contacting the IIMB HR department via the contact details in the notification is recommended.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the IIMB Manager – Post Graduate Programme Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
